ValidationRule.description: Do not allow the user to change the status to "Waiting For Approval"
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(StageName) ), TEXT(StageName) = 'Waiting For Approval', NOT($Profile.Id = '00e5a000001Gfuk'), NOT($Profile.Id = '00e0b000001iU5h') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please use the "Submit For Approval" button in the action bar on the top right of this page. This will notify the operations team.
